title: Adicea cephalantha
taxonomy: Adicea cephalantha belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a species of flowering plant endemic to Madagascar. The classification of Adicea cephalantha is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, and order Gentianales. intro: Adicea cephalantha, also known as Baeckea frutescens, is a shrub native to Australia that is valued for its medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
